title: 14 Piece Reflective Cat Collar Pack with Bell,kitten collar Safety Quick Release Buckle,with Name Tag,Adjustable 7.5''-12.5'',for Girl Male Cats,Pet Supplies,Stuff,Accessories(12 Colors & 2 ID Tags)
features: 【Cute and safe collar buckle】 The collar buckle uses a cute and fashionable cat face design. In order to prevent cats from being hurt, we design cat ears into round ears. Most cat face buckles of similar products on the market have sharp ears, which can easily hurt cats.

【Safety Reflective Strip Design】 Reflective tape and bright colors can help you find pets in dark environments. When pets are outdoors, pedestrians and vehicles on the road can see them more easily, thereby reducing the risk of pets going out and making them safer in outdoor activities.

【Safe Breakaway Cat Collar】 The length of these cat collars can be adjusted between 19-32cm. The sturdy detachable safety release buckle can be unlocked with a certain amount of force. If your pet is trapped, it can freely break free to avoid the pet being strangled by the collar, ensure the safety of the pet.

【Anti-lost ID tags and ringtones】 Using 2 anti-lost ID tags, you can fill in the owner's information. When the pet gets lost, the finder can find the owner of the pet through the anti-lost ID tag. With colorful bells, you can find cute pets more easily.
description: Product Description Extodry Brand Mission: Extodry brand name comes from the abbreviation of Extraordinary Vocabulary. The purpose of the brand and the company's philosophy is to provide you with high-quality and extraordinary products, so that you can have a better buying and using experience. Why choose Extodry collars? Different from market pointed cat ears, our round cat ears are safer. Can be seen at night because of the reflective strip. Quick release cat buckle to ensure the safety of cats. Covers all mainstream colors, you can match your cat with your favorite color. Adjustable from 7.5 to 12.5 inch with snap buckle, 0.4 inch width. Made of high quality different colors strong nylon,Comfortable and durable. With 2 anti-lost Id tags, prevent cats from getting lost. 12 different(1 x light green,1 x light purple,1 x grass green,1 x hot pink,1 x pink,1 x sapphire blue,1 x fluorescent green,1 x red,1 x sky blue,1 x yellow,1 x black,1 x orange)colors. NOTE： 1.You can write your pet's address and phone number on a piece of paper in this ID tube.Please tighten it to prevent it from falling and losing. 2.Ensure that you can get two fingers between your cat and the collar for safety and comfort when you fit your cat's collar.
